mapper.select: SELECT MAX(unique_id) FROM ietm_icn_manage WHERE cmnode_id = #{cmnodeId} AND isdeleted = '0'

SELECT icn.id, icn.create_by, icn.create_time, icn.update_by, icn.update_time, icn.cmnode_id, icn.sns, icn.rpc, icn.rpc_name, icn.originator, icn.originator_name, icn.unique_id, icn.variant_code, icn.issue_no, icn.security_classification, icn.security, icn.icn_type, icn.ispublished, icn.isdeleted, icn.version, icn.org_identity, icn.icn, att1.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att1.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att1.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att1.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att2.id as "relatedIetmAttachment.id", att2.file_name as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileName", att2.file_key as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileKey" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att1 ON icn.id = att1.pid AND att1.file_type = '实体文件' LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att2 ON icn.id = att2.pid AND att2.file_type = '相关文件' WHERE icn.cmnode_id = #{cmnodeId} AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn.create_time DESC

SELECT icn.id, icn.create_by, icn.create_time, icn.update_by, icn.update_time, icn.cmnode_id, icn.sns, icn.rpc, icn.rpc_name, icn.originator, icn.originator_name, icn.unique_id, icn.variant_code, icn.issue_no, icn.security_classification, icn.security, icn.icn_type, icn.ispublished, icn.isdeleted, icn.version, icn.org_identity, icn.icn, att1.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att1.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att1.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att1.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att2.id as "relatedIetmAttachment.id", att2.file_name as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileName", att2.file_key as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileKey" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att1 ON icn.id = att1.pid AND att1.file_type = '实体文件' LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att2 ON icn.id = att2.pid AND att2.file_type = '相关文件' WHERE icn.cmnode_id IN ( SELECT id FROM ietm_project_configuration_management START WITH id = #{cmnodeId} CONNECT BY PRIOR id = pid ) AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn.create_time DESC
